source: federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm (2024-2026) and press release monetary20250905a.htm (2027 tentative schedule); hand-curated because FOMC meetings are not a FRED data release (FRED release 101 'FOMC Press Release' pads daily placeholder dates and is unusable as a meeting calendar)
note: Decision days: second day of each scheduled two-day meeting; statement at 2:00 pm ET, press conference 2:30 pm ET. Refresh annually when the Fed publishes the next tentative schedule.
